name: matematic-skills-en
description: English hub of method-neutral legal AI skills - verification core (grounding, red-team, scoring), content quality, GDPR operations (DPIA, breach, DSAR, RoPA/DPA), EU law sources, and nine EU national-law connectors in one install. Deep Polish-jurisdiction skills live in the Polish marketplace. Vendor-agnostic.

plugins.name: verification-foundation
plugins.description: Jurisdiction-neutral verification core (5 skills): legal syllogism, citation extraction, clause checklist, adversarial red-team review, output scoring. No connectors, sends no data out.

plugins.name: content-quality
plugins.description: English-writing quality tools (2 skills): humanizer (strips AI-writing patterns) and reviewer (senior editor, verdict + charges). Changes wording, never facts.

plugins.name: eu-law-sources
plugins.description: EU legislation and CJEU case law via EUR-Lex / Cellar SPARQL (1 skill). Ships the eu-sparql MCP connector (read-only, public API). Requires node/npx.

plugins.name: data-protection
plugins.description: GDPR operations for law firms and DPOs (4 skills): DPIA (Art. 35-36), 72h breach response (Art. 33-34), data subject rights / DSAR (Art. 12, 15-22), records of processing RoPA and processor-contract DPA review (Art. 30, 28). Grounded in the GDPR articles and EDPB guidelines.

plugins.name: eu-multi-jurisdiction
plugins.description: Nine EU national-law connectors in one install (DE, AT, ES, FI, IE, NL, SE, FR, LU) - legislation and case law against each official source, with ELI/ECLI identifiers. Requires uv/uvx; France needs free PISTE credentials.
